# services.opentsdb

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.opentsdb`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.opentsdb.config` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | The contents of OpenTSDB's configuration file |
| `services.opentsdb.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable OpenTSDB. |
| `services.opentsdb.group` | `string` | Group account under which OpenTSDB runs. |
| `services.opentsdb.package` | `package` | The opentsdb package to use. |
| `services.opentsdb.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Which port OpenTSDB listens on. |
| `services.opentsdb.user` | `string` | User account under which OpenTSDB runs. |
